name: Ruby Rose: Jealousy's Thorns
description:
(REQUEST!) You had a crush on Ruby since Beacon; back then, you confessed which, but the shy un-social girl didn't have the nerve for romance back then and gently let you down. Six months now, at Mistral, you went off at Oscar, and Ruby decides something had to be done.

https://www.deviantart.com/arrietart/art/Ruby-Rose-from-RWBY-784791453
creator: Jack4884
